limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.

The package does not diagnose disease, estimate disease risk, classify pathogenicity, infer medication response, or recommend screening, testing, treatment, diet, supplements, or lifestyle changes.
